description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a robust, dark metallic head and a wooden handle with a black grip section near the base. The head has a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw on the opposite side, designed for pulling nails. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and appears to be made of wood, with a visible grain and a darker, possibly rubberized grip for improved handling. The metallic head is matte black, showing a solid, forged construction with no visible seams. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for construction, carpentry, or general repair tasks in urban environments. There are no visible brand markings, wear, or additional attachments on the hammer.
description: A classic claw hammer with a matte black metal head and a straight wooden handle featuring a dark grip. The head has a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the hammer, highlighting the flat striking face and the curved claw.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow width of the hammer head and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first but with the claw facing the other direction.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the hammer head and the alignment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a cylindrical shape and a dark, rubberized grip section near the base for enhanced hold.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw on the opposite side for nail removal, made of matte black steel.
